_doc: Maps team name (must match team-repos.json team_name) to the Jira epic keys that track that team's path-to-zero criticals work. Used by Phase 1b jira-fetcher. Add a team here when their work moves under Jira tracking. Source: team memory + 1:1 status updates as of 2026-06-04.

epics.name: security
epics.note: Security vulnerability tasks — primary burndown tracker

epics.name: FrenchFines-master
epics.note: FrenchFines master epic (single-child parent — real sub-task progress lives in PSDEV-63383)

epics.name: FrenchFines-tracker
epics.note: FrenchFines technical upgrade — Geoffray's sub-task tracker; the authoritative source for FrenchFines progress percentage

epics.name: criticals
epics.note: Master ticket for hub-portal critical remediation

epics.name: ci-cd-permanence
epics.note: Trivy + Dependabot CI/CD permanence layer (also tracked by Publishing A&F)
